## Checklist

- [ ] I reused existing modules/utilities where possible instead of creating near-duplicates.
- [ ] I removed or refactored obsolete paths instead of keeping parallel logic.
- [ ] New/changed behavior includes tests for success and failure paths, or this is documented as not applicable.
- [ ] Public behavior, workflow, or contributor-facing changes are documented.
- [ ] No new `TODO`/`FIXME` was added without a linked issue.
- [ ] `pnpm check` passes locally, or the exception is explained above.
